name: Chili-Basted Barbecue Chicken
recipeIngredient: 1 teaspoon ground coriander or a few sprigs of fresh cilantro
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the vegetable oil, garlic (pressed), chili powder, lime juice, cumin, coriander (or cilantro sprigs), clove, and cayenne pepper in a medium bowl.
2. Place chicken pieces in a large pan in a single layer.
3. Pour the oil mixture over the chicken.
4. Turn the chicken to coat evenly with the marinade.
5. Cover and refrigerate for at least four hours or overnight, turning occasionally.
6. Prepare the barbecue grill on medium heat.
7. Remove the chicken from the pan, reserving the marinade.
8. Season the chicken with salt and pepper.
9. Grease the grill rack and arrange the chicken on the rack, skin side down.
10. Cover and grill until the chicken is cooked through, basting every 10 minutes with the reserved marinade and turning occasionally, for about 30 minutes or until done.
11. Transfer to a platter and serve.
